headline: Which S&P500 stocks are showing activity after the closing bell on Monday?
summary: As the regular session of the US market on Monday comes to an end, let's delve into the after-hours session and discover the top S&P500 gainers and losers shaping the post-market sentiment.

headline: Schwab Trading Activity Index™: STAX Score Reaches a Four-Year High in June
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, July 06, 2026--The Schwab Trading Activity Index™ (STAX) increased to 59.12 in June, up 7.33% from its score of 55.08 in May. The only index of its kind, the STAX is a proprietary, behavior-based index that analyzes retail investor stock positions and trading activity from Schwab’s millions of client accounts to illuminate what investors were actually doing and how they were positioned in the markets each month.

headline: Morning Call Sheet: Markets watch Fed, chips and global liquidity risks
summary: Matt Maley, Chief Market Strategist at Miller Tabak, Joe Mazzola, Head of Trading and Derivatives Strategy at Charles Schwab, and Henrietta Treyz, Co Founder and Director of Economic Policy at Veda Partners, discussed liquidity risks, chip stocks, Fed uncertainty and tariffs.
